title: NLUO and AZB & Partners launch single credit course on arbitration: Enrol today!
description: National Law University Odisha (NLUO), in collaboration with AZB & Partners, has launched a single credit course titled 'The Lifecycle of Arbitration: Strategy, Procedure and Enforcement in Commercial Disputes.'This course is designed to provide students with a practice-oriented understanding of the lifecycle of arbitration in commercial disputes under the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996. It will explore why arbitration is a preferred mode of dispute resolution in commercial and corpo
